goal: Add a `fizz-buzz` function in package `fizz-buzz` that takes one positive integer N and returns a list of N strings: position I (1-based) is "FizzBuzz" when I is divisible by both 3 and 5, "Fizz" when divisible by 3 only, "Buzz" when divisible by 5 only, and the decimal representation of I otherwise. Export `fizz-buzz`.
